title: ephielis vouarana
intro: Ephielis vouarana, also known as the Malabar nut tree, is a tropical plant native to the western Ghats of India. The plant's seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Malabar nut tree has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and promoting digestive health. The seeds can be prepared as an herbal tea or used in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also sometimes used as a natural remedy in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
